description: Offline comparison of OpenHands amortized forgetting vs DCE content-aware scoring. Measures needle survival in context (deterministic) without LLM API calls.

modes.openhands: Positional amortized forgetting — keep first chunk + most recent, drop middle. No content analysis.
modes.structural: BM25 goal relevance + structural action density boost + frequency demotion.
modes.bm25: BM25 goal relevance (40%) + corpus uniqueness via Jaccard (60%).
modes.naive: Simple sliding window — keep most recent messages that fit.
